user.title: Connect to What's Up Docker
user.description: Enter the connection details for your WUD instance.

data_description.trigger_refresh_delay: Seconds to wait after a successful scan/trigger before refreshing container states. 0 = refresh immediately (default); -1 = disable auto refresh.
data_description.triggers_excluded: Trigger identifiers (e.g. docker.local) for which no per-container button will be created.
data_description.add_instance_name: Prefix per-container sensor and button names with the instance name, to tell entities apart when multiple WUD instances are configured.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to WUD. Check that the host and port are correct and that WUD is running.

abort.already_configured: This WUD instance is already configured.
